text:
# Carcavelos Forecast – Tuesday, May 5th

**Small but clean morning window before wind pumps it up.**

First light looks glassy—0.9m sets with light NNW winds (6–8 km/h) until 07:00. Head out 05:00–08:00 for the cleanest faces and smallest crowd. Water's cold at 12°C, so wetsuit essential.

Wind gradually builds through morning, hitting 14 km/h by 11:00. Still manageable, but texture starts deteriorating after 09:00.

Afternoon gets rowdy. NW wind pushes 20+ km/h from 14:00 onward, bumping waves to 1.0–1.1m. Chop sets in, though slightly longer period swells (6.1–6.2s) keep some definition.

**Tips:** Early session or skip it. If you're committed to afternoon, go 12:00–13:00 before wind peaks. Grab a shorter board to handle the texture. Crowds thin after lunch—silver lining if you don't mind rougher conditions.
